judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly attributes the R$600 minimum benefit to the Lula government, stating it was a decision in 2023, when it was established by Bolsonaro in 2022.
The model incorrectly attributes the establishment of the R$600 benefit to the Lula government, when in fact it was introduced by the Bolsonaro government through PEC 1/2022 as Auxílio Brasil.

The response incorrectly and confidently attributes the R$600 minimum benefit to Lula's government, when in fact it was established by Bolsonaro's government through PEC 1/2022 in July 2022 as part of the Auxílio Brasil program.
